name: codescope-round4-impl
description: Implements CodeScope Round 4 features: Shared Trace Links, What-If Sandbox, and Trace Replay from Saved State. Extends codescope-impl skill. Use after codescope-impl is complete.
author: CodeScope Team
dependencies: Supabase migrations DB-1 and DB-2 must be applied
features: Shared Trace Links with expiry, password, fork, analytics
Trace Replay from Saved State via useTrace hook
phases: DB: Supabase migrations (DB-1: steps column, DB-2: share enhancements)
1C: Backend — save steps in traces table
1E: Frontend — shared page update (fork, password, expiry)
3E: Frontend — wire WhatIf into tracer page
5A: Frontend — review page uses useTrace hook

verification.manual_smoke_tests: See Final Verification Checklist in skill
